title: Bloomy Experience
description: Extention mod for Bloomy Modpack and LevelZ, which grants LevelZ experience to the player by breaking blocks
body:
# Function
This is mod is part of the [Bloomy Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bloomy-modpack) and aims to enhance the [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) experience system to be more balanced within the modpack! 

# How does it work?
It works by adding a chance to give the player [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) experience upon breaking a block with the correct tool.

# Mod Goal
The mod attempts to make the pace of playing [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) in the [Bloomy Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bloomy-modpack) better by adding extra experience by just playing the game.
